opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Idaho Air Pros has no booking button, no contact form, and is phone-only contact.
opportunities.observation: After-hours HVAC calls in Boise go unanswered, sending leads directly to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget to capture and confirm appointments 24/7 without staff.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and zero digital intake beyond a phone number.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call leaves no record, losing revenue with no follow-up path.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording with auto-CRM logging to capture every lead and outcome.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no loyalty or recurring service signals on site.
opportunities.observation: Idaho Air Pros has no system to re-engage past customers before each Boise HVAC season.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal maintenance reminders via SMS and email tied to last service date.
